'''Mad in Taiwan''' is a Taiwanese all star team which played a show match against [[MVP Ozone]] in [[Season 3 Taiwan Regional Finals]].<ref>[http://gnn.gamer.com.tw/7/84547.html 《英雄聯盟》TPS 與橘子熊爭奪 S3 台港澳代表門票 韓國冠軍隊伍登蛋踢館]''gamer.com.tw''</ref>
